overall.description: First-person exploration of a cyberpunk apartment interior from Cyberpunk 2077. The player moves from a desk area with window blinds through a workspace with a robotic arm and computer, then into a kitchen area with a smart fridge and counter. The scene features distinctive teal lighting mixed with warm sunlight through blinds.

scene_state.functional_zone: desk area by window with blinds

events.description: potted plant temporarily blocks view as camera moves past it

agents.ego_description: slowly moving along the desk, examining items near the window with striped sunlight

entered.detail: horizontal blinds with sunlight streaming through creating striped light patterns on surfaces
large potted plant with broad leaves sitting on the desk shelf
white built-in desk with raised shelf containing books and small items
black ergonomic office chair positioned at the desk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of a desk area illuminated by sunlight filtering through horizontal blinds. The camera moves slowly along the desk, passing a large potted plant and revealing a built-in white desk with shelves. An office chair sits in the background as the camera continues toward a computer workstation.

events.description: UI prompt appears for Chimera Cola Classic item on the desk
camera turns left toward the kitchen area, leaving the desk behind

agents.ego_description: examining desk items including a soda can with interaction prompt, then turning toward the kitchen

entered.detail: large curved monitor displaying system interface with yellow accents
mechanical robotic arm mounted on the desk surface
wall covered with colorful graffiti stickers and street art
cardboard box with 'KIBBLE AND SCOP' text leaning against the wall

segments.scene_description: The camera moves into the computer workstation area, revealing a robotic arm, curved monitor, and a wall covered in colorful stickers. A cardboard box labeled 'KIBBLE AND SCOP' sits on the floor. The player interacts with a soda can on the desk before turning left toward the kitchen area.

events.description: UI prompt appears for Nicola Blue item near the refrigerator
smart fridge display illuminates showing temperature readout and interface

agents.ego_description: approaching the smart refrigerator and examining its digital interface and contents

entered.detail: tall smart refrigerator with glowing blue digital display showing 41°F and inventory list
open shelving unit with bottles and containers
kitchen counter with various items and dishes

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the kitchen area, focusing on a tall smart refrigerator with an illuminated digital interface displaying 41°F. The player approaches the fridge, triggering an interaction prompt for a Nicola Blue item. Kitchen shelves and counters become visible as the camera moves deeper into the kitchen space.

scene_state.functional_zone: kitchen counter with dishes and broken window

events.description: UI prompt appears for Real Water item on the kitchen counter

agents.ego_description: examining the kitchen counter with dirty dishes and looking at the cracked window behind

entered.detail: stack of white plates and bowls with chopsticks scattered on the counter
window with cracked glass showing neon light reflections from outside
wall with blue 'SAMURAI' poster and other artwork

segments.scene_description: The camera slows as it approaches the kitchen counter, revealing a stack of dirty dishes and chopsticks. A broken window with cracked glass shows neon reflections from the city outside. The player examines a Real Water item on the counter while a Samurai poster is visible on the right wall.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a cluttered cyberpunk apartment, transitioning from a sunlit workspace into a dim, neon-tinged kitchen. It begins by gliding along a white desk where sunlight filters through horizontal blinds and passes a large potted plant. As the camera moves further into the workstation, the lighting shifts to reveal a robotic arm, a curved monitor, and a sticker-covered wall before turning left toward the living area. The scene then opens into the kitchen, centering on a smart refrigerator with a glowing digital interface before drifting toward the counters. Finally, the camera slows beside a stack of dirty dishes and a bottle of Real Water, ending with a view of a broken window reflecting the neon city lights outside.
